SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Lab.ID) FROM Laboratory AS Lab JOIN Patient AS P ON Lab.ID = P.ID WHERE Lab.IGA > 80 AND Lab.IGA < 500 AND CAST(strftime('%Y', P."First Date") AS INTEGER) >= 1990

SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GOT >= 60 ORDER BY T1.Birthday DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(p.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age FROM "Player" AS p JOIN "Player_Attributes" AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.birthday IS NOT NULL AND pa.sprint_speed >= 97 AND CAST(strftime('%Y', pa.date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 2013 AND 2015

SELECT L.name, C.match_count FROM (SELECT league_id, COUNT(*) AS match_count FROM "Match" WHERE league_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY league_id) AS C JOIN "League" AS L ON C.league_id = L.id ORDER BY C.match_count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT team_fifa_api_id FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed > 50 AND buildUpPlaySpeed < 60

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN PA.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / COUNT(P.player_fifa_api_id) FROM "Player_Attributes" AS PA JOIN "Player" AS P ON PA.player_fifa_api_id = P.player_fifa_api_id WHERE CAST(substr(P.birthday,1,4) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992

SELECT CAST(SUM(pa.long_shots) AS REAL) / COUNT(pa.player_fifa_api_id) FROM "Player_Attributes" AS pa JOIN "Player" AS p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Ahmed Samir Farag'

SELECT T1.player_name, AVG(T2.heading_accuracy) AS average_heading_accuracy FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE T1.height > 180 GROUP BY T1.player_name ORDER BY average_heading_accuracy DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT L.name FROM "League" AS L JOIN "Match" AS M ON M.league_id = L.id WHERE M.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY L.id, L.name HAVING CAST(SUM(M.home_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT M.id) > CAST(SUM(M.away_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT M.id)
SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE substr(birthday,1,4) = '1970' AND substr(birthday,6,2) = '10'

SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.home_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM "Match" AS T1 JOIN `Country` AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id WHERE T2.name = 'Poland' AND T1.season = '2010/2011'

SELECT T1.player_name, AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player) OR T1.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) GROUP BY T1.player_name ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM Player AS t1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_fifa_api_id = t2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE t1.height > 170 AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) >= '2010' AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) <= '2015'

SELECT T1.buildUpPlaySpeedClass FROM "Team_Attributes" AS T1 JOIN "Team" AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'KSV Cercle Brugge'

SELECT T1.driverRef FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 20 ORDER BY T2.q1 DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT T2.surname FROM qualifying AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 19 ORDER BY CAST(T1.q2 AS REAL) ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 JOIN circuits AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId WHERE T2.country = 'Germany'
SELECT T1.lat, T1.lng FROM circuits AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'

SELECT q1 FROM qualifying AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 354 AND T2.forename = 'Bruno' AND T2.surname = 'Senna'
SELECT d.number FROM drivers AS d JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverId = q.driverId WHERE q.raceId = 903 AND q.q3 LIKE '0:01:54%'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.driverId) FROM "results" AS r JOIN "races" AS ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix' AND ra.year = 2007 AND r.time IS NULL
SELECT d.driverId FROM drivers AS d JOIN results AS r ON d.driverId = r.driverId WHERE r.raceId = 592 AND r.time IS NOT NULL AND d.dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.dob ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT d.url FROM lapTimes AS lt JOIN drivers AS d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId WHERE lt.raceId = 161 AND lt.time LIKE '1:27%'
SELECT c.lat, c.lng FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE r.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'
SELECT c.url FROM constructors AS c JOIN constructorResults AS cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId WHERE cr.raceId = 9 AND cr.points IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cr.points DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT d.code FROM qualifying AS q JOIN drivers AS d ON q.driverId = d.driverId WHERE q.raceId = 45 AND q.q3 LIKE '1:33%'
SELECT T1.url FROM seasons AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year WHERE T2.raceId = 901
SELECT T1.driverId, T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.dob FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 872 AND T2.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.dob ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST((SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Paul' AND surname = 'di Resta') AND raceId = 853) - (SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Paul' AND surname = 'di Resta') AND raceId = 854) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Paul' AND surname = 'di Resta') AND raceId = 853)
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN time IS NOT NULL THEN driverId END) AS REAL) / COUNT(driverId) FROM results WHERE raceId IN (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE date = '1983-07-16')
SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', MIN(date)) FROM races) AND STRFTIME('%m', T1.date) = (SELECT STRFTIME('%m', MIN(date)) FROM races)
SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T2.points FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.points DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname, T1.name FROM races AS T1 JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverId = T3.driverId ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(T3.milliseconds) FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN lapTimes AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId AND T2.driverId = T3.driverId JOIN races AS T4 ON T2.raceId = T4.raceId WHERE T1.forename = 'Lewis' AND T1.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T4.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND T4.year = 2009

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.position > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS percentage FROM results r JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND ra.year >= 2010

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, wc.max_points FROM (SELECT driverId, COUNT(wins) AS win_cnt, MAX(points) AS max_points FROM driverStandings WHERE wins IS NOT NULL GROUP BY driverId) AS wc JOIN drivers AS d ON d.driverId = wc.driverId WHERE wc.win_cnt = (SELECT MAX(win_cnt) FROM (SELECT driverId, COUNT(wins) AS win_cnt FROM driverStandings WHERE wins IS NOT NULL GROUP BY driverId))

SELECT CAST(strftime('%Y','now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', dob) AS INTEGER) AS age, forename || ' ' || surname AS name FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Japanese' AND dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.name AS race_name, c.name AS circuit_name, c.location FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE CAST(strftime('%m', r.date) AS INTEGER) = 9 AND CAST(strftime('%Y', r.date) AS INTEGER) = 2005

SELECT races.name FROM "races" AS races JOIN "results" AS results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN "drivers" AS drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Alex' AND drivers.surname = 'Yoong' AND results.position IS NOT NULL AND results.position < 20

SELECT r.name AS race, r.year AS year FROM "lapTimes" AS lt JOIN "races" AS r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId JOIN "drivers" AS d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher' AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.name, res.points FROM results AS res JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY r.year ASC, r.round ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE r.name = 'European Grand Prix'
SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Silverstone Circuit'
SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'

SELECT T1.country FROM circuits AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId JOIN results AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId JOIN drivers AS T4 ON T3.driverId = T4.driverId ORDER BY T4.dob ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.driverRef FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T3.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND T3.year = 2007 ORDER BY T2.positionOrder LIMIT 1

SELECT T3.name FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.forename = 'Lewis' AND T1.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY T2.rank ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(CAST(fastestLapSpeed AS REAL)) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2009 AND T1.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL

SELECT T1.positionOrder FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T3.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T3.year = 2008
SELECT T1.time FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2008 AND T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.position = 2

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverId) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2008 AND T2.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T1.time IS NOT NULL AND T1.raceId IN (SELECT raceId FROM results GROUP BY driverId HAVING COUNT(raceId) > 1)

SELECT CAST((T2.milliseconds - T1.milliseconds) AS REAL) / T2.milliseconds * 100 FROM results AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND T1.position = 1 AND T2.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')) AND T1.time IS NOT NULL AND T2.time IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "circuits" WHERE location = 'Adelaide' AND country = 'Australia'
SELECT MAX(cs.points) FROM constructorStandings AS cs JOIN constructors AS c ON cs.constructorId = c.constructorId WHERE c.nationality = 'British'
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM constructors AS c JOIN constructorResults AS cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId WHERE cr.raceId = 291 AND cr.points = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT cr.constructorId FROM "constructors" AS c JOIN "constructorResults" AS cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese' AND cr.points = 0 GROUP BY cr.constructorId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cr.raceId) = 2) AS sub

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS completion_percentage FROM results JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese' AND races.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

WITH driver_points AS (SELECT r.year, res.driverId, SUM(res.points) AS total_points FROM results res JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE r.year < 1975 GROUP BY r.year, res.driverId), max_points AS (SELECT year, MAX(total_points) AS max_points FROM driver_points GROUP BY year), champion AS (SELECT dp.year, dp.driverId FROM driver_points dp JOIN max_points mp ON dp.year = mp.year AND dp.total_points = mp.max_points), champion_times AS (SELECT r.year, (CAST(substr(res.time,1,2) AS REAL)*3600 + CAST(substr(res.time,4,2) AS REAL)*60 + CAST(substr(res.time,7,2) AS REAL) + CAST(substr(res.time,10) AS REAL)/1000) AS secs FROM results res JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId JOIN champion ch ON res.driverId = ch.driverId AND r.year = ch.year WHERE res.time IS NOT NULL) SELECT year, AVG(secs) AS avg_time_seconds FROM champion_times GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

SELECT lt.lap FROM lapTimes lt JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId WHERE r.year = 2009 AND lt.driverId = (SELECT ds.driverId FROM driverStandings ds JOIN races r2 ON ds.raceId = r2.raceId WHERE r2.year = 2009 AND ds.position = 1 ORDER BY ds.points DESC LIMIT 1) AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.status = 'Banned' AND T1.borderColor = 'white'
SELECT T1.name FROM cards AS T1 JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.originalType = 'Artifact' AND T1.colors = 'B'
SELECT manaCost FROM cards WHERE layout = 'normal' AND frameVersion = '2003' AND borderColor = 'black' AND availability = 'mtgo,paper'

SELECT id, (CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1 AND isTextless = 0) AS REAL) / CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards") AS REAL) * 100) AS percentage FROM "cards" WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1 AND isTextless = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT st.setCode) FROM "set_translations" AS st JOIN "sets" AS s ON st.setCode = s.code WHERE s.block = 'Commander' AND st.language = 'Portuguese (Brasil)'
SELECT DISTINCT fd.type FROM "foreign_data" AS fd JOIN "cards" AS c ON fd.uuid = c.uuid WHERE fd.language = 'German' AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" WHERE (power IS NULL OR power = '*') AND text LIKE '%triggered ability%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cards.id) FROM "cards" AS cards JOIN "legalities" AS legalities ON cards.uuid = legalities.uuid JOIN "rulings" AS rulings ON cards.uuid = rulings.uuid WHERE legalities.format = 'premodern' AND rulings.text = 'This is a triggered mana ability.' AND cards.side IS NULL

SELECT fd.name FROM "foreign_data" AS fd JOIN "cards" AS c ON fd.uuid = c.uuid WHERE fd.language = 'French' AND c.type = 'Creature' AND c.layout = 'normal' AND c.borderColor = 'black' AND c.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson'
SELECT DISTINCT st.language FROM "sets" AS s JOIN "set_translations" AS st ON s.code = st.setCode WHERE s.baseSetSize = 180 AND s.block = 'Ravnica'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "legalities" AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE l.format = 'commander' AND l.status = 'legal'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f.uuid IS NOT NULL THEN c.id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) * 100 AS percentage FROM cards c LEFT JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid AND f.language = 'French' WHERE (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*')
SELECT language FROM foreign_data WHERE multiverseid = 149934
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 AND layout = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM cards
SELECT T2.language FROM sets AS T1 JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T1.mcmName = 'Archenemy' AND T1.code = 'ARC'
SELECT language FROM foreign_data WHERE name = 'A Pedra Fellwar'
SELECT name FROM cards WHERE name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper') ORDER BY convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T3.translation FROM cards AS T1 JOIN sets AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code JOIN set_translations AS T3 ON T2.code = T3.setCode WHERE T1.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND T3.language = 'Italian'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM foreign_data WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND language = 'Korean'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards AS T1 JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.setCode WHERE T2.translation = 'Hauptset Zehnte Edition' AND T1.artist = 'Adam Rex'
SELECT T2.translation FROM sets AS T1 JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T1.name = 'Eighth Edition' AND T2.language = 'Chinese Simplified'
SELECT CASE WHEN T2.mtgoCode IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END FROM cards AS T1 JOIN sets AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T1.name = 'Angel of Mercy'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM "sets" AS s JOIN "set_translations" AS st ON s.code = st.setCode WHERE s.block = 'Ice Age' AND st.language = 'Italian' AND st.translation IS NOT NULL
SELECT isForeignOnly FROM "sets" WHERE code = (SELECT setCode FROM "cards" WHERE name = 'Adarkar Valkyrie' LIMIT 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "sets" AS s WHERE s.baseSetSize < 10 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "set_translations" AS st WHERE st.setCode = s.code AND st.language = 'Italian' AND st.translation IS NOT NULL)
SELECT DISTINCT T1.artist FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T1.artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis','Aaron Miller','Chippy')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T1.convertedManaCost > 5 AND (T1.power = '*' OR T1.power IS NULL)
SELECT flavorText FROM foreign_data WHERE language = 'Italian' AND name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
SELECT fd.text FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "sets" AS s ON c.setCode = s.code JOIN "foreign_data" AS fd ON fd.uuid = c.uuid WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap' AND fd.language = 'Italian'

SELECT fd.name FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "foreign_data" AS fd ON fd.uuid = c.uuid JOIN "sets" AS s ON s.code = c.setCode WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap' AND fd.language = 'Italian' AND c.convertedManaCost = (SELECT MAX(c2.convertedManaCost) FROM "cards" AS c2 JOIN "sets" AS s2 ON s2.code = c2.setCode WHERE s2.name = 'Coldsnap')

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN convertedManaCost = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / SUM(convertedManaCost) FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "sets" AS s ON c.setCode = s.code WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap' AND c.convertedManaCost IS NOT NULL
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL AND cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM cards WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap'

SELECT T1.format, GROUP_CONCAT(T2.name, ', ') AS banned_cards FROM "legalities" AS T1 JOIN "cards" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.status = 'Banned' GROUP BY T1.format HAVING COUNT(T1.status) = (SELECT COUNT(status) FROM "legalities" WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format ORDER BY COUNT(status) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT T1.name, T2.format FROM cards AS T1 JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.edhrecRank = 1 AND T2.status = 'Banned'
SELECT T1.name, T3.format FROM cards AS T1 JOIN sets AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code JOIN legalities AS T3 ON T1.uuid = T3.uuid WHERE T2.name = 'Hour of Devastation' AND T3.status = 'Legal'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM sets AS T1 JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T2.language = 'Korean' AND T1.code NOT IN (SELECT setCode FROM set_translations WHERE language LIKE '%Japanese%')
SELECT T1.frameVersion, T1.name, T2.status FROM cards AS T1 JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.artist = 'Allen Williams' AND T2.status = 'Banned'
SELECT bond_type FROM `bond` GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(bond_type) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN element = 'o' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM "atom" WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM "bond" WHERE bond_type = '-')

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) FROM "molecule" AS m JOIN "bond" AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+' AND b.bond_type IS NOT NULL
SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = '+' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bond WHERE bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id AND bond_type = '#')
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'c' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(atom_id) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '=')
SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR004_8_9' UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR004_8_9')

SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected c JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '=' UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected c JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '=')
SELECT m.label FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE a.element = 'h' AND m.label IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.label ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT element FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '-' AND a.element IS NOT NULL GROUP BY element ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT b.bond_type FROM connected AS c JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE (c.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND c.atom_id2 = 'TR004_20') OR (c.atom_id = 'TR004_20' AND c.atom_id2 = 'TR004_8')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) FROM atom AS a WHERE a.element IN ('i','s') AND a.molecule_id IS NOT NULL AND a.molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '-')

SELECT CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (total - fluorine_cnt) * 100.0 / total END AS percentage FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total FROM "molecule" AS m WHERE m.label = '+') AS t CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id) AS fluorine_cnt FROM "atom" AS a JOIN "molecule" AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+' AND a.element = 'f') AS f

-- error: referenced bond.bond_id without alias; corrected to T1.bond_id
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.bond_type = '#' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(T1.bond_id) AS percent FROM "bond" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+'
SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR000' AND element IS NOT NULL ORDER BY element ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(bond_type = '=') AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100, 5) AS percent FROM "bond" WHERE molecule_id = 'TR008'
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(label = '+') AS REAL) / COUNT(molecule_id) * 100, 3) AS percent FROM "molecule"
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(atom_id) * 100, 4) AS percent FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR206'
SELECT T1.element, T3.label FROM atom AS T1 JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.molecule_id = 'TR060'

SELECT T1.bond_type, CASE WHEN T3.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_carcinogenic FROM "bond" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR010' GROUP BY T1.bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id FROM "molecule" AS m WHERE m.label = '-' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "bond" AS b JOIN "connected" AS c ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = '-') ORDER BY m.molecule_id ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.bond_id) FROM "bond" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR009' AND (T2.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T2.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12')
SELECT b.bond_type, c.atom_id, c.atom_id2 FROM "bond" AS b JOIN "connected" AS c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_6_9'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bond_id) FROM "connected" WHERE (atom_id LIKE 'TR%_19' OR atom_id2 LIKE 'TR%_19') AND bond_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT DISTINCT element FROM "atom" WHERE molecule_id = 'TR004'
SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE SUBSTR(a.atom_id,7,2) BETWEEN '21' AND '25' AND m.label = '+'

SELECT T3.bond_id FROM atom AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T1.element = 'p' INTERSECT SELECT T3.bond_id FROM atom AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T1.element = 'n'

SELECT T3.label FROM bond AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = ' = ' GROUP BY T3.label ORDER BY COUNT(T1.bond_id) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.atom_id) FROM `atom` AS T1 JOIN `connected` AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.element = 'i'
SELECT element FROM `atom` WHERE atom_id NOT IN (SELECT atom_id FROM `connected` UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM `connected`)

SELECT T1.atom_id FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id JOIN "bond" AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.molecule_id = 'TR041' AND T3.bond_type = '#' UNION SELECT T1.atom_id FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id2 JOIN "bond" AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.molecule_id = 'TR041' AND T3.bond_type = '#'
SELECT element FROM "atom" WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM "connected" WHERE bond_id = 'TR144_8_19' UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM "connected" WHERE bond_id = 'TR144_8_19')
SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM "atom" AS a JOIN "connected" AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2 JOIN "bond" AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '#'
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(m.label = '+') AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.bond_id),5) FROM "bond" AS b JOIN "molecule" AS m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = '-'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "atom" WHERE "element" IN ('p','br') AND "molecule_id" IN (SELECT "molecule_id" FROM "bond" WHERE "bond_type" = '#')
SELECT CAST(SUM(a.element = 'cl') AS REAL) / COUNT(a.atom_id) * 100 AS percent FROM atom a WHERE a.molecule_id IN (SELECT b.molecule_id FROM bond b WHERE b.bond_type = '-')
SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_10_11' UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_10_11')
SELECT CAST(SUM(a.element = 'pb') AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS percentage FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+'
SELECT a.element, COUNT(*) FROM "atom" AS a JOIN "molecule" AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+' AND substr(a.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4' GROUP BY a.element
SELECT CAST(SUM(element = 'h') AS REAL) / COUNT(element) AS ratio, m.label FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE a.molecule_id = 'TR006' GROUP BY m.label
SELECT m.molecule_id FROM "molecule" AS m JOIN "atom" AS a ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '-' GROUP BY m.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "satscores" AS T1 JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrMath > 400 AND T2.Virtual = 'F'
SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE (COALESCE("Enrollment (K-12)",0) + COALESCE("Enrollment (Ages 5-17)",0)) > 500

SELECT MAX(CAST(frpm."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / CAST(frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL)) FROM frpm JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr != 0 AND CAST(satscores.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / CAST(satscores.NumTstTakr AS REAL) > 0.3 AND frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL AND frpm."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL
SELECT s.CharterNum, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ss.AvgScrWrite DESC) AS rank FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNum IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rank

SELECT frpm."School Name" AS "School Name", (COALESCE(schools."Street",'') || ', ' || COALESCE(schools."City",'') || ', ' || COALESCE(schools."State",'') || ' ' || COALESCE(schools."Zip",'')) AS "Full Address" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools."CDSCode" WHERE frpm."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL AND frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL AND (frpm."Enrollment (K-12)" - frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > 30

SELECT s.School FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode JOIN satscores ss ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE "Free Meal Count (K-12)" IS NOT NULL AND "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL AND (CAST("Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (K-12)" > 0.1) AND ss.NumGE1500 > 0
SELECT sch.School, sch.FundingType FROM schools AS sch JOIN satscores AS sat ON sch.CDSCode = sat.cds WHERE sch.County = 'Riverside' AND sat.AvgScrMath > 400

SELECT T1.School, T1.Street, T1.City, T1.State, T1.Zip FROM schools AS T1 JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.`County Name` = 'Monterey' AND T2.`School Type` = 'High' AND T2.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` > 800

SELECT T1.School, T2.AvgScrWrite, T1.Phone FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE (T1.OpenDate > '1991-01-01' OR T1.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') AND T2.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL

WITH diffs AS (
    SELECT 
        T1."School Name" AS school_name,
        T3.DOCType,
        (T1."Enrollment (K-12)" - T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS enrollment_diff
    FROM frpm AS T1
    JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode
    WHERE T3.FundingType = 'Local'
),
avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(enrollment_diff) AS avg_enrollment_diff
    FROM diffs
)
SELECT school_name, DOCType
FROM diffs, avg_diff
WHERE enrollment_diff > avg_enrollment_diff
SELECT CAST(`Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / `Enrollment (K-12)` FROM frpm ORDER BY `Enrollment (K-12)` DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9
SELECT CAST(`FRPM Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / `Enrollment (K-12)` FROM frpm WHERE `County Code` = '66' ORDER BY `FRPM Count (K-12)` DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT T1.Street, T1.City, T1.Zip, T1.State FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL AND T2.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(T2.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T2.NumTstTakr ASC LIMIT 1

WITH top_school AS (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (AdmFName1 || ' ' || AdmLName1) AS full_name FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM top_school) AND AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT (AdmFName2 || ' ' || AdmLName2) FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM top_school) AND AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT (AdmFName3 || ' ' || AdmLName3) FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM top_school) AND AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL

SELECT AVG(CAST(T2.NumTstTakr AS REAL)) FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.City = 'Fresno' AND T1.OpenDate IS NOT NULL AND T1.OpenDate >= '1980-01-01' AND T1.OpenDate <= '1980-12-31' AND T2.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL
SELECT s."Phone" FROM "schools" AS s JOIN "satscores" AS sc ON s."CDSCode" = sc."cds" WHERE s."District" = 'Fresno Unified' AND sc."AvgScrRead" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sc."AvgScrRead" ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT School FROM (SELECT s.School, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY sc.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rn FROM schools s JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds WHERE s.Virtual = 'F' AND sc.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL) WHERE rn <= 5

SELECT s.School, ss.AvgScrWrite FROM schools AS s JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE (s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich') OR (s.AdmFName2 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName2 = 'Ulrich') OR (s.AdmFName3 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName3 = 'Ulrich')
SELECT s.School FROM schools AS s JOIN frpm AS f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE s.DOC = 31 AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY f."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CDSCode) AS REAL) / 12 FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda' AND DOC = '52' AND STRFTIME('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = '54' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = '52' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM schools AS T1 JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.`County Name` = 'Orange'
SELECT T1.School, T1.Street FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 6, 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.County = 'Los Angeles' AND T2.Charter = 0 AND (T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` * 100 / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)`) < 0.18
SELECT COUNT(T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.`Academic Year` = '2014-2015' AND T2.City = 'Fremont' AND T2.EdOpsCode = 'SSS'

SELECT T1.School, CAST(T2.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) / T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` * 100 AS `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)` FROM schools AS T1 JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.County = 'Los Angeles' AND T2.`Low Grade` = 'K' AND T2.`High Grade` = '9'
SELECT County, COUNT(CDSCode) FROM schools WHERE Virtual = 'F' AND County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') GROUP BY County ORDER BY COUNT(CDSCode) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT GSoffered FROM schools WHERE ABS(Longitude) = (SELECT MAX(ABS(Longitude)) FROM schools)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.City) AS num_cities, T1.City, COUNT(T1.CDSCode) AS num_schools FROM schools AS T1 JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T2.`Low Grade` = 'K' AND T2.`High Grade` = '8' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types' GROUP BY T1.City
SELECT T1.`District Code`, CAST(T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` * 100 FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine'

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3 FROM schools WHERE County = 'San Bernardino' AND City = 'San Bernardino City Unified' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31' AND (SOC = '62' OR DOC = '54')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'East Bohemia' AND T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT district.district_id) FROM district JOIN client ON district.district_id = client.district_id WHERE client.gender = 'F' AND district.A11 > 6000 AND district.A11 < 10000
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "client" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.A3 = 'North Bohemia' AND T2.A11 > 8000

SELECT a.account_id, (SELECT MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) FROM district) AS gap FROM disp dp JOIN client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F') AND d.A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district)

SELECT a.account_id FROM "account" AS a JOIN "disp" AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN "client" AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id JOIN "district" AS di ON c.district_id = di.district_id WHERE c.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM "client") AND di.A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM "district")

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id FROM "account" AS a JOIN "loan" AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' AND l.status = 'approved' AND l.amount = (SELECT MIN(l2.amount) FROM "loan" AS l2 JOIN "account" AS a2 ON l2.account_id = a2.account_id WHERE a2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND strftime('%Y', l2.date) = '1997' AND l2.status = 'approved')

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id FROM account AS a JOIN loan AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE l.duration > 12 AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993' AND l.amount = (SELECT MAX(l2.amount) FROM account AS a2 JOIN loan AS l2 ON a2.account_id = l2.account_id WHERE l2.duration > 12 AND strftime('%Y', a2.date) = '1993')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.client_id) FROM disp AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F' AND T2.birth_date < '1950-01-01' AND T3.A2 = 'Sokolov'

SELECT T3.A2 FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T4.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T1.birth_date = '1976-01-29'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.client_id) * 100 FROM client AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'Jihočeský kraj' ORDER BY T2.A4 DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST((T4.balance - T3.balance) AS REAL) / T3.balance * 100 FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN trans AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.date = '1993-07-05' AND T1.status = 'A' AND T3.date = '1993-03-22' AND T4.date = '1998-12-27' ORDER BY T1.date ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(amount) * 100 FROM loan
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.status = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.amount < 100000

SELECT T4.A2 AS district, CAST((T4.A13 - T4.A12) AS REAL) / T4.A12 * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T2.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'
SELECT T1.A2, COUNT(T2.client_id) FROM district AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T1.A2 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.client_id) DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.loan_id) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.amount >= 250000 AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND T1.status = 'A' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

SELECT D.A2, SUM(T.amount) AS total_amount FROM trans AS T JOIN account AS A ON T.account_id = A.account_id JOIN district AS D ON A.district_id = D.district_id WHERE T.type = 'VYDAJ' AND T.date LIKE '1996-01%' GROUP BY D.A2 ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "loan" AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.district_id = 1 AND T2.status IN ('C','D')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client WHERE gender = 'M' AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A15 = (SELECT DISTINCT A15 FROM district ORDER BY A15 DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1))

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id FROM client AS c JOIN disp AS d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN account AS a ON d.account_id = a.account_id JOIN trans AS t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998' AND t.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND strftime('%Y', date) = '1998')
SELECT DISTINCT T1.frequency FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.frequency <> 'OWNER' AND T2.A11 > 8000 AND T2.A11 <= 9000
SELECT AVG(CAST(A15 AS REAL)) FROM "district" WHERE A15 > 4000 AND A15 IS NOT NULL AND district_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT district_id FROM "account" WHERE date >= '1997-01-01')
SELECT T3.amount FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.client_id = 3356 AND T3.operation = 'VYBER'
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.client_id) * 100 FROM client AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A11 > 10000

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.date LIKE '1997%' THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T3.date LIKE '1996%' THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T3.date LIKE '1996%' THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) * 100 FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M'
SELECT COUNT(*), k_symbol FROM `order` WHERE account_id = 3 AND amount = 3539 GROUP BY k_symbol

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T2.birth_date ASC, T3.A11 ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT AVG(T1.amount) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.status IN ('C', 'D') AND T2.operation = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT T1.client_id, CAST((strftime('%Y', '2024-01-01') - strftime('%Y', T1.birth_date)) AS REAL) AS age FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id WHERE T3.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3 FROM trans AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T2.date LIKE '1993%' AND T1.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) BETWEEN '1995' AND '2000'
